name: Democrats.org
subject: 🎄Add your name: sign our holiday card for the Obamas 🎄
body:

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c285/4067b0a/22c5fb6ae/7e060725/3782565040/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161222_dnc_f&source=em_20161222_dnc_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c285/4067b0a/22c5fb6ae/7e060722/3782565040/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161222_dnc_f&source=em_20161222_dnc_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c285/4067b0a/22c5fb6ae/7e060723/3782565040/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161222_dnc_f&source=em_20161222_dnc_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c285/4067b0a/22c5fb6ae/7e060720/3782565040/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161222_dnc_f&source=em_20161222_dnc_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Mike=20Pence?=
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
President-elect Trump and I are counting on the continued commitment of leaders like you. |

Friend, they said we couldn’t do it. But on November 8th, you showed the world that America will once again be a country of, for and by the PEOPLE. Now is the time to start uniting our country and putting America first again. President-elect Trump, myself, and your Republican majorities in the House and Senate pledge: To work for you.... To fight for you... To win for you... And our hope is you will remain committed to our movement and make a special contribution of $25, $35, $50, $100 or even $200 today. During the campaign we were able to get our message to the voters and fight back against the liberal media because of your support, Friend. And if we’re going to keep winning we need you in our corner. In the months ahead we will face strong opposition to President-elect Trump’s agenda to Make America Great Again and we will rely on your support to get our message to the American people. Please renew your commitment to our movement today with a generous contribution of $25, $35, $50, $100 or even $200. Thank you for your unwavering support. Sincerely, Mike Pence Vice President-elect of the United States
CONTRIBUTE $100

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba23oBAGF4hCG6WgaCKTnDRMN6aaaaCKTnBMFYGIsa?p=7@2~yC2&j=Yurngqdx1A_brVng.hjr&g=q&s=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

And our hope is you will remain committed to our movement and make a special contribution of $25, $35, $50, $100 or even $200 today.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Roy Cooper
subject: They failed us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We have to fight back. Add your name here if you're with me.
We have to fight back. Add your name here if you're with me.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120282f/2fde7c66/43942cdd/1569233a/419575826/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-repeal-hb-2-now?utm_campaign=em16161222hb2advgqfulrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161222hb2advgqfulrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
They failed us, friends, The legislature had a chance to do the right thing for North Carolina yesterday. They had the chance to repeal HB 2. They could have removed the stain from our reputation around the country and around the world. They could have removed the discriminatory law. **[But the Republican legislative leaders failed us. They broke their promise and they destroyed the public trust in government. We have to fight back. Add your name here if you're with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120282f/2fde7c66/43942cdd/1569233a/419575826/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-repeal-hb-2-now?utm_campaign=em16161222hb2advgqfulrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161222hb2advgqfulrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** I am disappointed that Republican legislative leaders refused to live up to their promise to fully repeal House Bill 2. I'm disappointed for the people of North Carolina. People want us to work together for the good of our state. But we were all let down yesterday. This was our best chance. This cannot be our last chance. **[Sign your name here and let them know -- HB 2 is wrong for North Carolina.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120282f/2fde7c66/43942cdd/1569233a/419575826/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-repeal-hb-2-now?utm_campaign=em16161222hb2advgqfulrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161222hb2advgqfulrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Thanks for your continued support, Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120282f/2fde7c66/43942cdd/1569233a/419575826/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-repeal-hb-2-now?utm_campaign=em16161222hb2advgqfulrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161222hb2advgqfulrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120282f/2fde7c66/43942cdd/1569233d/419575826/VEsD/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: protecting our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

With the Electoral College having completed its tally on Monday, the dust has finally settled on the 2016 Presidential race. Like most Americans, I am glad to put one of the most negative and dispiriting elections in our nation's history behind us for good.

But there is a critical piece that still needs addressing. As you have probably read by now, news reports suggest that foreign agents were responsible for the hacking of our election systems, seemingly favoring one candidate over another. I authored an op-ed this week for the Sun Sentinel in which I raised these very concerns:
Instead of dismissing our intelligence community's reports as sour grapes or a conspiracy theory, President-elect Donald Trump should consider the information with the full seriousness and credibility it deserves. Having advisers like Paul Manafort and cabinet picks like Rex Tillerson nearby - who have clear financial entanglements with Russia - does nothing to allay the legitimate concerns Americans have. Furthermore, criticizing the brave men and women of the intelligence community not only disparages their service, it harms our national security by helping adversaries breed distrust of our government, which divides the country even more. It leaves the United States at a disadvantage on the global stage. No matter which party is in the White House, doubt in America's democratic institutions rattles our nation to its core.
I encourage you to check out the full piece at the **[Sun Sentinel right here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e37/738133e4/33653180/7f85b3d2/3273221251/VEsH/ "http://www.sun-sentinel.com/opinion/fl-pmcol-trump-russia-20161219-story.html")**.

I have made increasing our cybersecurity efforts one of my key priorities on the Intelligence Committee, and hope that the next Congress continues those efforts.

Safe holiday travels,

Patrick |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e37/738133e4/33653180/7f85b3d3/3273221251/VEsE/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e37/738133e4/33653180/7f85b3cc/3273221251/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

[Privacy Policy](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e37/738133e4/33653180/7f85b3cd/3273221251/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")
---
clean_body: | | | | | Friends, With the Electoral College having completed its tally on Monday, the dust has finally settled on the 2016 Presidential race. Like most Americans, I am glad to put one of the most negative and dispiriting elections in our nation's history behind us for good. But there is a critical piece that still needs addressing. As you have probably read by now, news reports suggest that foreign agents were responsible for the hacking of our election systems, seemingly favoring one candidate over another. I authored an op-ed this week for the Sun Sentinel in which I raised these very concerns: Instead of dismissing our intelligence community's reports as sour grapes or a conspiracy theory, President-elect Donald Trump should consider the information with the full seriousness and credibility it deserves. Having advisers like Paul Manafort and cabinet picks like Rex Tillerson nearby - who have clear financial entanglements with Russia - does nothing to allay the legitimate concerns Americans have. Furthermore, criticizing the brave men and women of the intelligence community not only disparages their service, it harms our national security by helping adversaries breed distrust of our government, which divides the country even more. It leaves the United States at a disadvantage on the global stage. No matter which party is in the White House, doubt in America's democratic institutions rattles our nation to its core. I encourage you to check out the full piece at the "". I have made increasing our cybersecurity efforts one of my key priorities on the Intelligence Committee, and hope that the next Congress continues those efforts. name: trish@dscc.org
subject: Your last chance to pick our member card, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Two neck-and-neck finalists remain for the official DSCC 2017 member card. But we can only have ONE winner! We need your input ASAP before voting closes at midnight... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed4d/2b07114c/417165fa/73683d3f/3056004494/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-21951222-Trish_DS-ProsHV")
---
Friend -- Designing Democratic party pride is tough! Reflecting on our progress and looking ahead to 2017, I just had to give you several options to vote on.

**Now the initial counts are in and I'm excited to personally present our two finalists for the tie-breaker!**

[**Friend, will you make sure to cast your final vote by midnight tonight and renew your support to pre-order the winner? Don 't miss your chance to weigh in!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed4d/2b07114c/417165fa/73683d3f/3056004494/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-21951222-Trish_DS-ProsHV")

| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed4d/2b07114c/417165fa/73683d3f/3056004494/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-21951222-Trish_DS-ProsHV")
---

No doubt it's a tough choice when President Obama's legacy and the values we stand for inspire us all to keep fighting.

**So be sure to select what speaks to you most as a Democrat, Friend!**

[**Log your final vote before midnight tonight and renew your support to reserve the winning design (we'll ship it to you for free)!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed4d/2b07114c/417165fa/73683d3f/3056004494/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-21951222-Trish_DS-ProsHV")

Thanks, Friend!
Trish Harris
Senior Designer and Brand Manager

P.S. If you've already ordered your member card, don't worry, your order has been processed. But if you'd like to vote again, **[click here.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed4d/2b07114c/417165fa/73683d3f/3056004494/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-21951222-Trish_DS-ProsHV")**

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20161222-Trish_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed4d/2b07114c/417165fa/73683d39/3056004494/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed4d/2b07114c/417165fa/73683d38/3056004494/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed4d/2b07114c/417165fa/73683d3b/3056004494/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
